arts.ttl: Lewandowski explains return to form at Barca under Flick
arts.sum: Barcelona striker Robert Lewandowski continued his good form this season with another two goals in Sunday’s 5-1 victory over Villarreal . “It was very important we bounced back, away from home, to score give goals, we got another three points.

arts.ttl: Barcelona injury news: Hansi Flick gives "very sad" Marc-Andre ter Stegen update
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick admits that first-choice goalkeeper Marc-Andre ter Stegen appears to have suffered a serious injury against Villarreal

arts.ttl: Gavi responds to Barcelona youngster’s breakout performance vs Villarreal
arts.sum: Barcelona star Gavi has tonight taken to social media, to send a message of support to teammate Pablo Torre. Youngster Torre, of course, is fresh off an evening to remember.…

arts.ttl: Robert Lewandowski and Raphinha bag braces as Barcelona blow away Villarreal
arts.sum: The Poland striker missed a penalty as Barca ran riot.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star sends message of support to Barcelona’s Marc-André ter Stegen
arts.sum: A headline member of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid has tonight sent a message of support the way of Barcelona star Marc-André ter Stegen. This, of…

arts.ttl: ‘Gives everything for the club’ – Hansi Flick hails Barcelona star after Villarreal romp
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has on Sunday moved to lavish praise on a leading member of his attacking ranks. As much comes fresh off Barcelona making it a perfect…

arts.ttl: Revitalised Raphinha produces a captain’s display for Barca
arts.sum: 1 - #Barcelona are the only team in Europe's top five leagues to have at least two players who have scored 5+ goals this season (Robert Lewandowski with 6 and Raphinha with 5). Furthermore, there are many more facets to his play this season and it’s difficult to argue that alongside Lamine and Robert Lewandowski, he’s been one of the most important players during what has been a sensational run in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Two Barcelona stars now lead Kylian Mbappé in Pichichi race
arts.sum: Two leading members of the attacking ranks at Barcelona on Sunday surged clear atop the Pichichi standings. As much comes owing to developments in Barca’s La Liga meeting with Villarreal.…

arts.ttl: Barcelona maintains perfect run thanks to a "very painful" victory over Villarreal
arts.sum: The Catalans sit comfortably at the top of the standings, showcasing their attacking talent, although the match was overshadowed by a serious injury to goalkeeper Marc-André ter Stegen . Villarreal thought they had taken an early lead when Alex Baena scored, but his goal was disallowed for offside.

arts.ttl: Source: Ter Stegen out months after knee injury
arts.sum: A knee injury will rule out Barcelona goalkeeper Marc-Andre ter Stegen for months after he was carried off on a stretcher during Sunday's 5-1 LaLiga win at Villarreal, a source confirmed to ESPN.
